info.title: TravelContext API
info.summary: API for the intelligent travel planning DSS prototype.
info.description: TravelContext API powers a prototype decision support system for personalized travel planning. The current API version exposes health checks, cities, points of interest, saved profiles, trip requests, personalized recommendations, persisted routes, and decision logs.

get.description: Returns the current backend service status. This endpoint is used for local checks, deployment checks, and screenshots.
Returns cities available in the current MVP seed dataset. Each city includes the number of available points of interest.
Returns one city from the current MVP seed dataset.
Returns points of interest for a city. Results can be filtered by normalized category and paginated with limit/offset.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of POI records to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of POI records to return.

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Number of POI records to skip.
schema.title: Offset

parameters.description: Number of POI records to skip.

schema.title: Response Get City Points Of Interest Cities  City Id  Pois Get

get.summary: Get point of interest by id
get.description: Returns one point of interest from the current MVP seed dataset.

404.description: Point of interest was not found.

post.description: Creates a persisted trip planning request from city, reusable user profile, trip duration, and resource constraints. The generated id can be used to request recommendations and routes.

Generates a ranked list of points of interest for an existing trip request. The scoring model combines interest match, budget fit, route convenience, pace fit, popularity, and data quality, then adjusts the ranking with goals, must-have/avoid constraints, trust level, accessibility needs, and preferred time windows from the saved profile.

404.description: Trip request or city was not found.

post.description: Persists an expanded digital consciousness profile with goals, constraints, and accessibility preferences.

get.description: Returns the most recent reusable planning profiles.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of profiles to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of profiles to return.

schema.title: Response List Profiles Endpoint Profiles Get

patch.description: Updates one reusable MVP profile. The endpoint is intended for demo flows without a full user account system.

post.description: Builds an ordered route from selected POIs or from generated recommendations. The route builder estimates distance, movement time, visit time, budget, and checks whether the plan fits time and budget constraints, including the projected return leg to the final point when strict constraints are enabled.

example.detail: POI 1001 does not belong to trip city

404.description: Trip request or POI was not found.

get.description: Returns a previously built persisted route plan.

post.description: Stores a user evaluation for a previously built route. The feedback entry is also written into the persistent decision log together with route snapshots.

get.description: Returns recent feedback and decision log entries persisted during planning. This is useful for experiments and demonstration of explainable planning history. In the current MVP this endpoint should be treated as a demo/admin surface.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of log entries to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return.

schema.title: Response List Decision Logs Endpoint Decision Logs Get

osm_id.title: Osm Id
osm_id.description: Linked OpenStreetMap object id if available.

pois_count.title: Pois Count
pois_count.description: Number of points of interest currently available for the city.

input_context.title: Input Context
input_context.description: Request payload and context captured for the event.

profile_snapshot.title: Profile Snapshot
profile_snapshot.description: Expanded profile snapshot used in the decision.

recommendations_snapshot.title: Recommendations Snapshot
recommendations_snapshot.description: Saved recommendation list snapshot if available.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: User rating of route usefulness from 1 to 5.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Optional user comment about the route quality.
examples: Маршрут хороший, но хотелось бы меньше музеев и больше прогулок.

comment.title: Comment
examples: Маршрут хороший, но хотелось бы больше еды и меньше музеев.

route_points_count.title: Route Points Count
route_points_count.description: Number of points in the evaluated route.

estimated_budget.title: Estimated Budget
estimated_budget.description: Estimated budget of the evaluated route in rubles.

total_time_minutes.title: Total Time Minutes
total_time_minutes.description: Total estimated route time in minutes.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Image source provider, for example wikimedia or opentripmap.

original_url.title: Original Url
original_url.description: URL of original or high-resolution image.

source_page_url.title: Source Page Url
source_page_url.description: Human-readable source page with attribution and license information.

attribution_text.title: Attribution Text
attribution_text.description: Prepared attribution text for frontend display.

is_primary.title: Is Primary
is_primary.description: Whether the image is the primary image for the POI.

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: Identifier of the POI in the external source.

url.title: Url
url.description: Human-readable or API URL for this source record if available.

license.title: License
license.description: Known license associated with this source payload.

last_synced_at.title: Last Synced At
last_synced_at.description: Timestamp when the data from this source was last synchronized.

opening_hours.title: Opening Hours
opening_hours.description: Opening hours in source format if available.

website.title: Website
website.description: Official or reference website if available.

wikimedia_commons.title: Wikimedia Commons
wikimedia_commons.description: Wikimedia Commons file or category id if linked.

osm_tags.title: Osm Tags
osm_tags.description: Source-like OSM tags used for category mapping.

estimated_price_level.title: Estimated Price Level
estimated_price_level.description: Estimated price level for planning constraints.

average_cost_rub.title: Average Cost Rub
average_cost_rub.description: Approximate expected cost in Russian rubles.

data_quality_score.title: Data Quality Score
data_quality_score.description: Normalized confidence/data quality estimate from 0 to 1.

interests.title: Interests
interests.description: Interest tags used by the recommendation engine.

interest_source.title: Interest Source
interest_source.description: How interest tags were assigned: manual, automatic, or mixed.

primary_image.description: Primary image metadata for the POI.

images.title: Images
images.description: All available image candidates with attribution metadata.

source_links.title: Source Links
source_links.description: Provenance links to external source records used for this POI.

data_freshness_days.title: Data Freshness Days
data_freshness_days.description: How old the current cached POI record is in days.

last_enriched_at.title: Last Enriched At
last_enriched_at.description: Timestamp when the POI was last enriched from external sources.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return.

include_accommodation.title: Include Accommodation
include_accommodation.description: Whether accommodation objects should be included in recommendations.

total_candidates.title: Total Candidates
total_candidates.description: Number of candidate POIs before limiting.

matched_interests.title: Matched Interests
matched_interests.description: User interests matched by this POI.

poi_ids.title: Poi Ids
poi_ids.description: Optional explicit POI ids to include. If omitted, the backend uses the recommendation engine to select route candidates.

max_points.title: Max Points
max_points.description: Maximum number of POIs to include in the route.

optimize_order.title: Optimize Order
optimize_order.description: Whether to order POIs with a nearest-neighbor heuristic.

strict_constraints.title: Strict Constraints
strict_constraints.description: Skip POIs that would exceed time or budget constraints when possible.

start_location.description: Optional explicit route start point, for example the user's hotel.

end_location.description: Optional explicit route end point. If omitted, the builder may return to start.

estimated_budget.title: Estimated Budget
estimated_budget.description: Total estimated route budget in Russian rubles.

daily_time_limit_minutes.title: Daily Time Limit Minutes
daily_time_limit_minutes.description: Available planning time per day in minutes.

within_time_limit.title: Within Time Limit
within_time_limit.description: Whether the route fits the total time limit.

within_budget.title: Within Budget
within_budget.description: Whether the route fits the profile budget.

return_leg_distance_km.title: Return Leg Distance Km
return_leg_distance_km.description: Distance of the final return leg to the end point.

return_leg_travel_minutes.title: Return Leg Travel Minutes
return_leg_travel_minutes.description: Travel time of the final return leg.

skipped_poi_ids.title: Skipped Poi Ids
skipped_poi_ids.description: POI ids skipped because of route constraints.

leg_distance_km.title: Leg Distance Km
leg_distance_km.description: Distance from previous route point or city center.

leg_travel_minutes.title: Leg Travel Minutes
leg_travel_minutes.description: Estimated travel time from previous route point.

cumulative_distance_km.title: Cumulative Distance Km
cumulative_distance_km.description: Route distance accumulated up to this point.

cumulative_time_minutes.title: Cumulative Time Minutes
cumulative_time_minutes.description: Travel plus visit time accumulated up to this point.

cumulative_budget_rub.title: Cumulative Budget Rub
cumulative_budget_rub.description: Budget accumulated up to this point.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Existing saved profile id to reuse for this trip.

profile.description: Inline profile to persist and attach to the trip request.

selected_interests.title: Selected Interests
selected_interests.description: Optional interests selected for this specific trip. If omitted, profile interests are used.

constraints.title: Constraints
constraints.description: Additional planning constraints for future extensions.

start_location.description: Preferred start point such as a selected hotel.

end_location.description: Preferred end point. If omitted, the route may return to the start location.

max_budget.title: Max Budget
max_budget.description: Maximum available trip budget in Russian rubles.

max_walking_distance_km.title: Max Walking Distance Km
max_walking_distance_km.description: Maximum preferred walking distance per day.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: User goals that shape the planning strategy.

must_have.title: Must Have
must_have.description: Trip elements the route should try to preserve.

avoid.title: Avoid
avoid.description: Trip elements the route should avoid when possible.

compromise_strategy.title: Compromise Strategy
compromise_strategy.description: What to prioritize when not all preferences fit together.

trust_level.title: Trust Level
trust_level.description: How much autonomy the user delegates to the planner.

accessibility_needs.title: Accessibility Needs
accessibility_needs.description: Accessibility or comfort requirements to preserve.

max_budget.title: Max Budget
max_budget.description: Maximum available trip budget in Russian rubles.

max_walking_distance_km.description: Maximum preferred walking distance per day.

tags.name: cities
